ValidationRule.description: User need to enter only hours(number) while answering Approximately how many total hours did it take you to resolve this case?
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: Survey_Question__r.Name ='Approximately how many total hours did it take you to resolve this case?' && not(ISNUMBER(Response__c )) && Response__c !=''
ValidationRule.errorMessage: User need to enter only hours(number) while answering this question - Approximately how many total hours did it take you to resolve this case?
